title: Game Screens
description:
The game is divided into 3 regions:
[ul]
1 - Map: Screen containing the game map, where the main interactions with the game take place.
2 - Developer Panel: Screen used to check the status of developers you currently have and the progress of accepted contracts.
3 - Note: Screen used to check basic game knowledge and information about architectures that have been learned so far.[/ul]
